description: Add a Fault Center in admin-web with separate manual and automatic fault reporting views, extend manual reports with userId, and complete the automatic desktop diagnostic upload path.

userStories.title: Add user_id support to desktop fault reports schema and mappings
userStories.description: As an operator, I need manual desktop fault reports to retain userId when available so that authenticated fault submissions can be traced to a user.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `user_id` column to `desktop_fault_reports` if it does not already exist
Update control-plane store/service/admin view mappings so manual fault report list and detail responses include `user_id`
Existing anonymous fault reports continue to work with null user_id values
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add automatic diagnostic upload capture path in desktop client
userStories.description: As the desktop runtime, I need to automatically upload diagnostic metadata for captured client errors so that operators can inspect automatic fault signals without waiting for manual reports.
acceptanceCriteria: Desktop client records automatic diagnostic uploads with `source_type = auto_error_capture`
Automatic upload payload includes device_id, app_name, file_name, file_size_bytes, sensitivity_level, and created_at
Automatic uploads do not reuse the manual fault report endpoint
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expose fault center route group in admin-web navigation
userStories.description: As an admin user, I want a Fault Center menu with manual and automatic sub-pages so that manual and automatic diagnostics are separated clearly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add left nav parent menu `故障中心` to admin-web
Add child route `手工故障上报` that points to the existing fault report page
Add child route `自动故障上报` for the automatic diagnostics page
故障中心 appears in the left navigation with the two sub-menu items in order
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Show userId on manual fault report list and detail views
userStories.description: As an admin user, I want the manual fault report UI to show userId when present so that authenticated reports are distinguishable from anonymous ones.
acceptanceCriteria: 手工故障上报列表新增 `userId` 列
userId 为空时列表与详情显示明确空值文案而不是报错
手工故障上报详情区域显示 `userId`
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build automatic fault report admin page from diagnostic uploads
userStories.description: As an admin user, I want an automatic fault report page backed by desktop diagnostic uploads so that auto-collected error logs can be filtered and inspected separately from manual reports.
acceptanceCriteria: 自动故障上报页面 reads from `/admin/security/action-diagnostic-uploads`
Page filters records to automatic uploads using `source_type = auto_error_capture`
List shows created time, userId, deviceId, appName, fileName, sensitivity level, and linked intent when present
Detail view shows upload metadata including bucket/key, sha256, file size, and source type
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Unify fault center page-level filters and empty states
userStories.description: As an admin user, I want both fault center pages to share clear filtering and empty-state behavior so that manual and automatic diagnostics feel like one coherent subsystem.
acceptanceCriteria: 手工故障上报 and 自动故障上报 both support app/device/user-oriented filtering appropriate to their data source
Both pages show explicit empty states when there are no records
Page titles and descriptions clearly differentiate manual vs automatic fault reporting
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
